seedanceSegments.title: Hook déglacage risotto
seedanceSegments.description: Vapeur vin sur riz toasté, beurre et échalotes, incorporation du riz; accroche texture-first.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening obeys texture-first rule; scene 2 clarifies steam clearing on rice.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may confuse sauté with boiling porridge; keep grains distinct in timing notes.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: wine sizzle; vapor hiss; butter crackle; spatula scrape

seedanceSegments.title: Lier risotto pois parmesan
seedanceSegments.description: Bouillon absorption, brassage crémeux, incorporation parmesan persil pois, refroidissement sur plat.

references.role: finished risotto with peas and herbs
references.name: RisottoPeasParmBindState
references.label: RisottoPeasParmBindState

seedanceSegments.continuity: Fragile bind state locked via reference image before cooling plate.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may homogenize peas into paste; fold timing is short and decisive.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: broth pour; creamy stir; dry cheese sprinkle; pea rattle; plate settle

seedanceSegments.title: Façonner et sceller mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Portions collantes, dimple, cube mozzarella, scellement; répétition géométrique.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Cheese containment is fragile; reference validates sealed shell.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may show mozzarella breaking skin; reference and negatives block leaks.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: sticky pull; soft pat; seam rub

seedanceSegments.title: Double panure ASMR
seedanceSegments.description: Farine, œuf, chapelure puis seconde couche; plateau prêt à frire.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Double breading is a timed ASMR ladder; final shot matches reference crust.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may skip second coat; timing forces duplicate sequence.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: powder puff; viscous drip; dry crumb taps

seedanceSegments.title: Friture dorée
seedanceSegments.description: Huile chaude 180–190, immersion, dorure, égouttage, empilement chaud.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Fry color fragile; reference anchors gold and bubble scale.
seedanceSegments.risk: Cold oil and soggy crust are common failures; negatives + reference mitigate.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: fry bubble choir; metal lift; oil drip

seedanceSegments.title: Cassure et fil mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Pression couteau, rupture, mosaïque pois, stretch lacté, vapeur cœur.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Interior geometry is fragile; hard cut to reference cross-section.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may erase peas or stretch cheese too elastic; reference locks.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: crust creak; snap; stretch; steam sigh

seedanceSegments.title: Hero bol et satisfaction
seedanceSegments.description: Grand bol rustique, salade jeunes pousses, personnage satisfait, linger final.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Closing requires visible character satisfaction per Licorn recipe rules.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may hide character; timing forces medium satisfaction beat.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: ceramic touch; leaf rustle; calm room
